name: mortgage-position-broker-correction-asterisk
rationale: Broker correction asserts mortgage_position as '2nd mortgage*' (asterisk-suffix, common broker-shorthand for 'noting this changed'). F1.MP parser must tolerate asterisk suffix per R11-A regex scope extension. loan_application doc shows '1st mortgage'. F1.MP canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier ('2nd mortgage') despite asterisk noise.
notes: Two-event sequence. R11-A anchor; tests broker-shorthand parser robustness.
